shopFakturen.title: SAP Invoice Import
shopFakturen.description: Upload an Excel file with SAP invoice numbers and create invoices in the shop.
shopFakturen.uploadHint: Expects an Excel file (.xlsx) with columns "Faktura" (SAP invoice number), "Kundenreferenz" (order number), "Fakturadatum" and "Nettowert". Invoices with net value 0 are created as a supplementary delivery (second invoice).
shopFakturen.dropzone: Drag a file here or click

opt.fieldOnConflict: On conflict, only set custom field
opt.fieldOnConflictHint: If a foreign shop invoice already exists, only the SAP number is written to the custom field (no second invoice).
opt.skipOriginalBackfill: Do not backfill missing original invoice
opt.skipOriginalBackfillHint: Prevents automatically creating a missing original invoice when only own SAP documents exist.
opt.markUnsentHint: Marks SAP invoices as present but not sent via the shop (sent=false).
opt.sendInvoiceHint: Sends the created/matched invoice to the customer right away via the Shopware function (mail + sent=true). Supplementary deliveries and foreign conflicts are not sent automatically.

shopFakturen.resultSummaryLine: {{total}} row(s) processed, {{unsent}} marked as not sent.
shopFakturen.problemsHint: These rows were not processed automatically.
shopFakturen.errorGeneric: An error occurred while processing the file.

obxSearch.title: OBX Matching
obxSearch.description: Upload OBX files and check which articles are missing in the catalog.
obxSearch.uploadHint: Upload one or more OBX files. The contained article numbers are matched against the catalog via the article number and the custom field wdu_ifs_productnumber.
obxSearch.missingHint: These articles from the OBX files were not found in the catalog.
obxSearch.allFound: All articles were found in the catalog.
obxSearch.foundHint: These articles were matched to the catalog.
obxSearch.filesHint: Overview of the processed OBX files. If a file contains customer info, you can view it via the button.

orders.invoiceAlreadySentDesc: This invoice has already been sent.

orders.exportDescription: Your order export is being prepared.

orderDetail.title: Order {{orderNumber}}
orderDetail.name: Name
orderDetail.downloadSuccess: Document PDF for order {{orderNumber}} is being downloaded.
orderDetail.downloadError: Could not download the document. Please try again.
orderDetail.shippingSuccessWithStatus: Shipping information has been saved and the order has been marked as shipped.
orderDetail.proformaDescription: Create a proforma invoice for prepayment or prior invoice requests. The number is automatically assigned by the Shopware number range.
orderDetail.proformaCreateFailedDesc: Error while creating the proforma invoice
orderDetail.settlementDescription: PDF with original invoice, cancellation deduction, and amount payable. When you pick a document from the list, gross amounts are prefilled from Shopware (order total at document time) if the order version is available — otherwise copy from the PDF. Assign the final invoice number in your ERP.
orderDetail.settlementPdfFailedDesc: The final invoice could not be generated.
orderDetail.settlementValidationNumber: Please enter the final invoice number.
orderDetail.settlementValidationOriginalNumber: Please enter the original invoice number.
orderDetail.settlementValidationOriginalAmount: Please enter a valid positive gross amount for the original invoice.
orderDetail.settlementValidationStornoNumber: Please enter the cancellation/credit note number.
orderDetail.settlementValidationStornoAmount: Please enter a valid cancellation amount (≥ 0).
orderDetail.settlementValidationStornoTooLarge: Cancellation amount cannot exceed the original gross amount.
orderDetail.additionalInvoiceDescription: Creates an additional invoice with custom line items and uploads the PDF to Shopware as an invoice document.
orderDetail.additionalInvoiceFailedDesc: The additional invoice could not be created or uploaded.
orderDetail.additionalInvoiceValidationItems: Please add at least one line item.
orderDetail.additionalInvoiceValidationDescription: Please enter a description for line item {{index}}.
orderDetail.additionalInvoiceValidationQuantity: Please enter a valid quantity for line item {{index}}.
orderDetail.additionalInvoiceValidationUnitNet: Please enter a valid net unit price for line item {{index}}.
orderDetail.dunningDescription: Send a dunning manually for this order.
orderDetail.documentsError: Could not load documents. Please try again.
orderDetail.shippedSuccessDescription: The order has been marked as shipped and the invoice has been sent via email.
orderDetail.shippedError: The order could not be marked as shipped. Please try again.
orderDetail.monduPluginErrorDescription: The Mondu payment plugin in Shopware is preventing the status change. Please set the delivery status manually in Shopware or contact Shopware/Mondu support.
orderDetail.monduPluginErrorPaymentSwitchDescription: The active payment method is not Mondu, but the Mondu plugin still blocks the shipped status (payment method was changed during checkout). In Shopware: cancel the old Mondu transaction or enable "Skip order state validation" in the Mondu plugin.
orderDetail.monduSubmitSuccessDesc: The invoice has been successfully submitted to Mondu for payment processing.
orderDetail.monduSubmitError: Could not submit invoice to Mondu. Please try again.
orderDetail.noInvoiceDescription: The order must have an invoice before it can be marked as shipped.
orderDetail.noCustomerHistory: No other orders from this customer

installmentPlan.autoDueDates: Auto due dates (monthly from first date)
installmentPlan.validationDeposit: Invalid deposit (must be > 0 and < order total)

keys.title: Integration API keys (n8n / automation)
keys.description: Keys for inbound automations (e.g. n8n). Each key applies only to this tenant and is sent in the X-METAORDER-Integration-Key header.
keys.createdMessage: Please copy the key now – it is shown only once.
keys.newKeyWarning: New key – copy and store it now. It will not be shown again.
keys.deleteConfirm: The key "{{name}}" will be permanently removed. Automations using it will stop working.

usage.title: Usage
usage.description: How n8n uses the key to push documents to METAorder.
usage.webhookHint: Outbound webhooks (METAorder → n8n) are configured in the Shopware tab.

semanticRanking.title: Semantic Ranking
semanticRanking.description: Weights for semantic ranking (vector, text, metadata). Values are normalized automatically.
semanticRanking.saveSuccessDesc: Weights apply to the next search request.
semanticRanking.saveErrorDesc: The settings could not be saved.

aiPrompts.title: AI Prompt Instructions
aiPrompts.description: Additional instructions appended to semantic search and FAQ prompts.
aiPrompts.semanticSearchPlaceholder: e.g. Keep answers concise and focus on technical data.
aiPrompts.faqPlaceholder: e.g. Give a short answer and cite key sources.
aiPrompts.saveSuccessDesc: The additional instructions are used immediately.
aiPrompts.saveErrorDesc: The settings could not be saved.

commercialAgent.title: Commercial Agent (email / PDF)
commercialAgent.description: Detects quote requests vs. purchase orders from PDF attachments on inbound IMAP mail, creates drafts, and can auto-create B2B offers or Shopware orders when confidence thresholds are met.
commercialAgent.enableDesc: Requires OpenAI and Shopware. Applies to PDF attachments on IMAP polling and to POST /api/commercial-agent/process for testing.
commercialAgent.minMatch: Min. product match score (0–100) for auto-create
commercialAgent.autoOrdersDesc: Off by default — higher risk. Only enable if createOrder matches your Shopware setup.
commercialAgent.documentLearningDesc: Stores short patterns from successful runs and optionally from your feedback. Examples are passed to the intent model as context — not full model fine-tuning.
commercialAgent.subAgentsDesc: When confidence is middling, a second LLM pass uses only the PDF excerpt to refine intent classification.
commercialAgent.learningExemplarsStored: {{count}} learning exemplars stored for this tenant
commercialAgent.webDomainVerifyDesc: After extraction, for a corporate domain (not freemail) up to three HTTPS pages (e.g. imprint) are fetched and compared to address/company. Does not overwrite fields automatically.
commercialAgent.extractionRefinementSubAgentsDesc: If plausibility flags missing billing fields, an extra small LLM pass may fill them from email context only. Existing values are never overwritten. Separate from intent sub-agents.
commercialAgent.lineItemSixDigitGtinPrefixesDesc: Comma-separated prefixes prepended to exactly 6-digit numeric lines before manufacturer-number fallback (e.g. META: 4026212). Leave empty to only match EAN/product number/manufacturer as stored.
commercialAgent.signatureCompanyVisionDesc: If company is missing in the draft, OpenAI may read small image attachments (signature/logo) from the same email. Increases API usage.
commercialAgent.customerMatchAutoMinDesc: After a Shopware customer is linked or created — auto-offer will not run below this threshold.
commercialAgent.customerAutoCreateMin: Min. score for auto customer create
commercialAgent.customerAutoCreateMinDesc: Only for automatic new-customer creation in Shopware, separate from displayed match confidence.
commercialAgent.minRankedEmailScore: Min. email rank score for auto-create
commercialAgent.minRankedEmailScoreDesc: Heuristic score of the top address from the message; no automatic creation below this.
